title: Italian Prawn Pilaf
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make Italian-inspired dish featuring succulent prawns and a delicious pilaf.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the raw prawns and cook until they turn pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the prawns from the skillet and set aside.
Add the pilaf to the skillet and cook according to the package instructions, using the aerated water.
Once the pilaf is cooked, fluff it with a fork and stir in the Kenyan spices.
Add the cooked prawns back into the pilaf and stir in the lemon juice.
Serve the prawn pilaf hot, garnished with lemon wedges if desired.
